topic: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)

questions.hindi: मैं चाय और कॉफी दोनों पीता हूँ।
options: She is smart and hardworking.
We were happy and excited.
I was tired, but I finished the work.
I drink both tea and coffee.
questions.answer: I drink both tea and coffee.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं चाय और कॉफी दोनों पीता हूँ।" = "I drink both tea and coffee."

questions.sentence: I was tired, but _____ finished the work.
options: but
tea
now
I
questions.answer: I
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I was tired, but I finished the work."

questions.sentence: Would you like tea or coffee? yesterday.
options: Would you like tea or coffee? yesterday.
Would you like tea or coffee?
questions.answer: Would you like tea or coffee?
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Would you like tea or coffee?"

questions.hindi: मुझे देर हो गई, इसलिए मैं जल्दी निकला।
options: It was raining, so we stayed inside.
I was hungry, so I ate food.
I came late because there was traffic.
I was late, so I left quickly.
questions.answer: I was late, so I left quickly.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे देर हो गई, इसलिए मैं जल्दी निकला।" = "I was late, so I left quickly."

questions.sentence: I came late _____ there was traffic.
options: he
she
tired
because
questions.answer: because
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I came late because there was traffic."

questions.sentence: Although he were tired, he kept working.
options: Although he were tired, he kept working.
Although he was tired, he kept working.
questions.answer: Although he was tired, he kept working.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Although he was tired, he kept working."

questions.hindi: मैं खाना बना रहा था जबकि वह पढ़ रही थी।
options: I was studying while he was sleeping.
I drink both tea and coffee.
She is smart and hardworking.
I was cooking while she was studying.
questions.answer: I was cooking while she was studying.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं खाना बना रहा था जबकि वह पढ़ रही थी।" = "I was cooking while she was studying."

options: and
but
tea
smart
questions.answer: smart
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "She is smart and hardworking."

questions.sentence: I like this, but it are expensive.
options: I like this, but it are expensive.
I like this, but it is expensive.
questions.answer: I like this, but it is expensive.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I like this, but it is expensive."

questions.hindi: तुम अभी जा सकते हो या बाद में।
options: We can watch a movie or stay at home.
I was late, so I left quickly.
It was raining, so we stayed inside.
You can go now or later.
questions.answer: You can go now or later.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "तुम अभी जा सकते हो या बाद में।" = "You can go now or later."

questions.sentence: It was raining, _____ we stayed inside.
options: because
he
she
so
questions.answer: so
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "It was raining, so we stayed inside."

questions.sentence: He succeeded because he worked hard yesterday.
options: He succeeded because he worked hard yesterday.
He succeeded because he worked hard.
questions.answer: He succeeded because he worked hard.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He succeeded because he worked hard."

questions.hindi: हालांकि मौसम खराब था, हमने यात्रा की।
options: Although it was difficult, we tried.
I was cooking while she was studying.
I was studying while he was sleeping.
Although the weather was bad, we traveled.
questions.answer: Although the weather was bad, we traveled.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हालांकि मौसम खराब था, हमने यात्रा की।" = "Although the weather was bad, we traveled."

questions.sentence: I was studying _____ he was sleeping.
options: tea
and
but
while
questions.answer: while
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I was studying while he was sleeping."

options: We was happy and excited.
We were happy and excited.
questions.answer: We were happy and excited.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We were happy and excited."

questions.hindi: यह अच्छा है, लेकिन इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है।
options: Would you like tea or coffee?
You can go now or later.
We can watch a movie or stay at home.
This is good, but it can be improved.
questions.answer: This is good, but it can be improved.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह अच्छा है, लेकिन इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है।" = "This is good, but it can be improved."

questions.sentence: We can watch a _____ or stay at home.
options: so
because
he
movie
questions.answer: movie
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "We can watch a movie or stay at home."

questions.sentence: I were hungry, so I ate food.
options: I were hungry, so I ate food.
I was hungry, so I ate food.
questions.answer: I was hungry, so I ate food.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I was hungry, so I ate food."

questions.hindi: वह रोई क्योंकि वह दुखी थी।
options: Although he was tired, he kept working.
Although the weather was bad, we traveled.
Although it was difficult, we tried.
She cried because she was sad.
questions.answer: She cried because she was sad.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह रोई क्योंकि वह दुखी थी।" = "She cried because she was sad."

options: while
tea
and
difficult
questions.answer: difficult
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "Although it was difficult, we tried."
